title: Build new at-a-glance dashboard index page

log.context: Build new at-a-glance dashboard index page

Done. Here's what was built and shipped:

**Commit:** `43c9ce1` — pushed to `bigclungus/clung.us` main.

**What the new `index.html` shows** (single fetch to `/api/tasks?limit=50`, auto-refreshes every 30s):

1. **Status bar** — three pills: `● N active` (teal), `✗ N failed` (red, dims to gray when 0), `⚠ N stale` (amber, dims when 0), plus `last pulse: HH:MM` derived from the most recent log timestamp across all tasks.

2. **Active tasks strip** — top 5 `in_progress` tasks, each showing: title ...(truncated)
